purpose: Validate the generated strict Combat feat bucket before further runtime implementation. The generated taxonomy is not authoritative; source validation gates implementation.

inputs.bookReference: Uploaded Saga Edition sourcebooks in the project workspace

policy.validFeatAnywhere: A feat may be valid even if it is species-, droid-, era-, beast-, or NPC-oriented. Missing from the main wiki page is not by itself enough to delete it.
policy.implementationGate: Only implement entries with validationStatus confirmed_feat or confirmed_feat_special_source. Entries marked source_review_required must be checked against primary source text before code changes. Entries marked invalid_not_swse_feat must not be implemented.
policy.taxonomyCaveat: Generated bucket placement may be wrong even when the feat is real. Runtime implementation should be based on feat text and existing engines, not just the Combat label.

nextImplementationGuidance: Proceed only with confirmed entries whose mechanics map to existing engines.
Treat species/rage/droid/beast feats as valid feats but do not expose them universally if prerequisites/source context restrict them.
Do not implement source_review_required entries until the exact primary source text is found.
Do not re-add Spring Attack or Reckless Charge unless a primary SWSE source is later produced.
